metadata.title: ASAF CMMC Level 2 Profile — AdinKhepra Protocol (SecRed Knowledge Inc.)
metadata.remarks: Selects all NIST SP 800-171 Rev 3 controls for CMMC Level 2 compliance. CMMC L2 is formally assessed against Rev 2 per 32 CFR Part 170; this profile uses Rev 3 (superset) for forward compatibility. All Rev 2 controls are covered. Classification: CUI // SP-CMMC.
